rationale: Educ. Code §13.009 governs appeals of commissioners court decisions under that chapter. It is unrelated to the Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amount.
quote: Sec. 13.009. APPEALS. (a) A decision of a commissioners court under this chapter may be appealed for a de novo review.
_note: No textual or topical overlap between proposed homestead exemption increase and this appeals provision.
